description: Harness upgrade manifest. Each entry describes how a file harness manages outside the repo (in <install-root>/) is brought forward when 'harness upgrade' runs. The runner sources scripts/lib/upgrade_actions.sh, dispatches each entry to the right action function, and aggregates results. See agents/claude/Dockerfile, agents/claude/entrypoint.sh, install.sh, and harness's cmd_mcp_install for B3-MANAGED comments that anchor each entry. Files intentionally NOT covered: .harness-net-overrides.json (user-managed via 'harness net open/close'), agent/<tool>/.harness-mcp-servers.json (regenerated each agent launch), agent/claude/.claude/settings.json (auto-augmented by the claude entrypoint each launch), .harness-runtime.yml (regenerated each compose invocation), output/ (proxy debug dumps, never managed), ollama-data/ (model blobs, never managed).

actions.description: Merge new env vars from .env.example into user's .env (preserves existing values, surfaces preceding comment context)
Add new firewall hostnames to user's allowlist (preserves existing entries and inline annotations such as # git-push)
Add new ccstatusline keys (preserves user widget customization; arrays are user-wins)

registry_actions.description: Update Serena MCP definition (preserves enable state in harness-meta.json and indexed code in data/)
